title: Dr. Awele Elumelu Appointed Chair of Transcorp Hotels Board - FinancialEDGE

html:
Transcorp Hotels Plc has announced the appointment of Dr. Awele Elumelu. OFR, as Chair of the Board of Directors.

Dr. Awele is a visionary leader whose track record speaks excellence, impact, and purpose. She brings exceptional leadership experience across healthcare, insurance, corporate governance, and philanthropy.

This marks a powerful new chapter as we double down on governance, growth, and redefining African hospitality at a global standard.

We are confident that the future isn’t just bright at Transcorp Hotels Plc, it’s intentional, strategic, and in capable hands.
